name: sms_send
description: Send one or more SMS messages to single or multiple recipients. Supports message scheduling up to 180 days, URL shortening, transliteration, flash SMS, and delivery time windows.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: Array of message objects, each containing destinations, sender, and content.

parameters.name: messages[].destinations
parameters.description: Array of destination objects with 'to' (E.164 phone number) and optional 'messageId'.

parameters.name: messages[].from
parameters.description: Sender ID, alphanumeric (max 11 chars) or numeric (max 16 digits).

parameters.name: messages[].text
parameters.description: The text content of the SMS message.

parameters.name: messages[].sendAt
parameters.description: ISO 8601 datetime for scheduling the message. Up to 180 days in the future.

parameters.name: messages[].validityPeriod
parameters.description: Validity period in minutes. Message delivery is attempted until this period expires.

parameters.name: messages[].notifyUrl
parameters.description: Webhook URL to receive delivery reports for this message.

parameters.name: messages[].callbackData
parameters.description: Custom data sent with the delivery report webhook callback.

messages.text: Your verification code is 482910. It expires in 10 minutes.
